title: The Autonomy Gap
excerpt: 69% of enterprises keep AI on a leash. Only 12% trust it to run end-to-end. Why trust — not capability — is the next bottleneck.

title: The Redesign Gap
excerpt: AI makes old processes faster. It doesn't make them better. Why the redesign gap is the most expensive invisible cost in enterprise AI.

title: The Supply Chain Gap
excerpt: 150M+ MCP SDK downloads, 200,000+ vulnerable instances, 40% of servers with zero auth. The AI agent supply chain is a security crisis.

title: The Coordination Gap
excerpt: 57% of enterprises have multi-agent systems in production. Only 12% coordinate them well. Why coordination is the new bottleneck.

title: The Runtime Gap
excerpt: 82% of enterprise AI agents never reach production. The model is ready. The runtime isn't.

title: The Injection Gap
excerpt: 85% of AI coding agents follow injected instructions from fake error logs. Prompt injection is the new supply chain attack.

title: The Identity Gap
excerpt: 80% of AI agents run on borrowed credentials. Only 21.9% have unique identities. The identity gap is AI's biggest security blindspot.

title: The Sprawl Gap
excerpt: 94% of organizations fear AI agent sprawl. By 2028, enterprises will go from 15 agents to 150,000+. Are you ready?

title: The Evaluation Gap
excerpt: 64% of leaders can't tell if their AI agents work. Only 31% have a measurement framework. Most teams are flying blind.

title: The Data Debt
excerpt: 85% of leaders say data gaps are killing AI value. Only 33% of enterprise data is AI-ready. The data foundation is the biggest unbudgeted liability.

title: The Fluency Gap
excerpt: 79% of organizations face AI adoption challenges despite record budgets. The problem isn't tech — it's that nobody invested in AI literacy.

title: The Value Chasm
excerpt: Nearly 40% of companies measured AI cost savings below 10%. Yet 90% are increasing budgets. The AI value gap is an organizational problem.

title: The Deprecation Crisis
excerpt: Model versions are deprecated faster than enterprises can redeploy. Version churn is the hidden cost nobody budgeted for.

title: The Observability Blindspot
excerpt: Enterprises ship AI agents without the monitoring to understand when they break. Observability is the next bottleneck after governance.

title: The Mandate Trap
excerpt: Meta and Google are mandating AI usage in performance reviews. Why mandates won't close the adoption gap — and what actually will.

title: The Enforcement Gap
excerpt: 82% of execs trust their AI policies. Only 14% enforce them at runtime. The enforcement gap is why agent pilots fail.

title: The Great Cheapening
excerpt: Inference costs dropped 280x from 2022 to 2026. This single economic shift explains the AI boom, the agentic turn, and the governance crisis.

title: The 68-Point Gap
excerpt: 88% of organizations say they use AI. The US Census Bureau says only 19.8% actually do. The gap nobody's talking about.

title: The Governance Multiplier
excerpt: Companies with AI governance ship 12x more agentic projects to production. Governance isn't a blocker — it's a multiplier.

title: The 88% Problem
excerpt: 88% of AI agent pilots never reach production. It's not the model — it's the governance.

title: Software - what is it good for?
excerpt: Four fundamental uses of software: math, brokering human interactions, entertainment, and software for software.

title: GoodJira: Next Generation Project Management for AI Agents
excerpt: Exploring the need for project management tools for managing SWE-Agents

title: My bets in software
excerpt: Forecasting the future of software development and placing bets on how AI will transform the industry.
